news.title: Millions of people are pretending to be AI chatbots — for fun - NPR
news.description: Websites like youraislopbores.me have become playgrounds for people looking for light relief in a bot-heavy world.

news.title: ‘Marathon’ Testing A Battle Royale-ish Mode, An Offering To Casuals - Forbes
news.description: Marathon is attempting to extend a hand to casuals by putting all players on the same page for a battle royale type mode where everyone starts on equal footing.

news.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Rival Launches, Hailed As 'True AAAA Pirate Experience" - GAMINGbible
news.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake fans check out this AAAA pirate experience!

news.title: The new Trump Phone design is here - The Verge
news.description: A heavily redesigned Trump Mobile website brings with it a better look at the updated T1 Phone, matching the design shown on a video call in February.

news.title: Introducing: Two Bracelet Updates For Tudor, Including A Full Ceramic Black Bay Bracelet - Hodinkee
